substep.title: Detect Mode
substep.action: Check whether the question tool is available. Available → INTERACTIVE. Absent → AUTONOMOUS. Later substeps branch on this.

check.action:
Confirm approach is present. If absent, emit to stdout and stop:
ERROR: Missing required field 'approach'. The dispatching caller failed to supply what to assess for risk. No reconnaissance performed.
Confirm the approach to assess — a plan, design, code path, or described approach. If genuinely ambiguous, ask one clarifying question via the question tool.

substep.title: Read the Approach and Mentioned Sources First
substep.action: Read the approach FULLY now (no offset/limit) — the plan/design document, the code path, or the described approach — along with any files it names. You cannot assess the risk of something you have not read in full. What the approach actually does shapes which categories apply and what the failure modes are.
